desc:
Savage Divide Treasure Map #4 dig site: To find this treasure you go to Solomon’s Pond. There, a wooden bridge leads over a small lake. Cross the bridge, in the middle of the bridge, jump down near the rocks next to the bridge and walkway, edge of water. There you will find the mound with the treasure.
Grid F4 (X: 2303.3, Y: 1611.4)
Submitted By MrCrazy
